:::::: {.columns style="display: flex;"}

::: {.column width="32%"}
## alipay 
![](../images/donation/p-alipay.png)
:::

::: {.column width="2%"}
:::

::: {.column width="32%"}
## wechatpay
![](../images/donation/p-wechatpay.png)
:::

::: {.column width="2%"}
:::

::: {.column width="32%"}
## paypal
https://www.paypal.me/shichenxie
:::

::::::
